categories.name: National Construction Code (NCC)
categories.description: Building and construction compliance requirements for commercial properties

items.title: Building Classification Verification
items.description: Confirm property classification (Class 5-9) under NCC Volume One

items.title: Fire Safety Compliance
items.description: Verify compliance with NCC Part E1-E4 fire safety provisions including sprinklers, exits, and fire resistance

items.title: Accessibility (DDA/NCC Part D3)
items.description: Disability Discrimination Act and NCC accessibility requirements for public access areas

items.title: Energy Efficiency (Section J)
items.description: NCC Section J energy efficiency compliance for commercial buildings

items.title: Structural Adequacy
items.description: Building structural integrity per NCC Part B1 and B2

categories.name: APRA Prudential Standards
categories.description: Lending and investment prudential requirements for commercial property finance

items.title: APS 220 Risk Management
items.description: Risk management framework for property-backed lending per APS 220

items.title: APS 113 Capital Adequacy
items.description: Capital adequacy assessment for property investment exposure

items.title: APS 117 Property Collateral Valuation
items.description: Independent valuation requirements per APS 117 for commercial property collateral

items.title: Loan-to-Value Ratio Assessment
items.description: LVR compliance for commercial property lending (typically max 65-70%)

items.title: Income Stress Testing
items.description: Rental income stress testing per APRA commercial property lending guidelines

categories.name: FIRB Foreign Investment
categories.description: Foreign Investment Review Board requirements for commercial property acquisitions

items.title: Foreign Ownership Assessment
items.description: Determine if FIRB approval required for foreign persons acquiring commercial property

items.title: Vacant Commercial Land Rules
items.description: FIRB restrictions on foreign acquisition of vacant commercial land

items.title: National Security Business Assessment
items.description: Assessment against FIRB national security business rules for sensitive locations

items.title: Application Fee & Timeline
items.description: FIRB application fees and statutory decision timeframes compliance

items.title: Condition Compliance
items.description: Review and track compliance with any FIRB approval conditions

categories.name: Environmental & Planning
categories.description: Environmental and planning compliance for commercial properties

items.title: Phase 1 Environmental Site Assessment
items.description: Contamination assessment per ASC NEPM and state EPA guidelines

items.title: Asbestos Register & Management Plan
items.description: Asbestos identification and management per WHS Regulations

items.title: Planning Permit & Zoning
items.description: Verify planning permit status and zoning compliance with local council

items.title: Lease Expiry Profile & WALE
items.description: Weighted average lease expiry analysis and vacancy risk assessment

items.title: Rent Review Mechanisms
items.description: CPI/fixed/market rent review clauses and upcoming review dates

items.title: Make-Good & Dilapidation
items.description: Tenant make-good obligations and dilapidation provisions

financial_statement.label: Financial Statements
financial_statement.description: P&L, balance sheet, rent roll, outgoings schedule

environmental.label: Environmental Reports
environmental.description: Phase 1/2 ESA, asbestos report, contamination assessment

legal_compliance.label: Legal & Compliance
legal_compliance.description: Title search, planning certificates, compliance certificates, FIRB
